rationale: Section 46.011 governs recapture of state funds when school districts sell IFA-financed instructional facilities. It does not reference or depend on the homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b); no operative conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 46.011. SALE OF INSTRUCTIONAL FACILITY FINANCED WITH INSTRUCTIONAL FACILITIES ALLOTMENT.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. §46.011's recapture formula turns on actual state vs. total bond payments, not on homestead exemption levels.
